ledger.description: Restart a crashed zero-VRAM CPU dataplane tier (T3/T5) via idempotent per-tier launch script
Offload a portion of T1 reasoning GPU→CPU/DDR5 (reduced -ngl) to free VRAM for a burst (§10.3)
Restore T1 reasoning to full GPU residency (-ngl 40) after an offload (§10.3)
